agents.name: Saint
agents.temperament: cooperates unconditionally, trusts to a fault

agents.name: TitForTat
agents.temperament: opens warm, then mirrors whatever you just did

agents.name: Grudger
agents.temperament: cooperates until crossed once, then never forgives

agents.name: ForgivingTFT
agents.temperament: mirrors defection but extends trust again when your reputation is mostly clean

agents.name: Suspicious
agents.temperament: opens cold, warms only once you prove yourself
